title: Evangelion 30
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 3.0 Post by Stan » Sun May 15, 2011 2:13 pm So the newest NEWTYPE magazine recently came out in Japan and its cover page features your one and only Asuka! If you observe the cover she has an eye-patch as seen in the Q: from the end of 2.22 and a slightly modified plug suit. She seemed to be holding some sort of lance in her hand? Here is the link to the cover page of the magazine http://www.hlj.com/product/KDKNT1106 Seems like the new eva movie is releasing this summer~~~

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun May 15, 2011 2:25 pm Please see: Studio Khara's big feature in June 2011 Newtype.... http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=11154 June Newtype Discussion http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=11368
